$meta.name: FlowTyping design system
$meta.note: Declarative snapshot of src/app.css for AI tooling (e.g. Claude Design). Hand-synced; NOT part of the build. When tokens in app.css change, mirror them here. Domain semantics live in JSDoc inside app.css and in docs/03-ui-viewmodel-contract.md — descriptions below are short pointers, not the source of truth.

primitives.$description: Raw values without product meaning. Safe to extend without touching UI.

fontSize.$description: Tailwind v4 type scale as calc(N * base). Change --font-size-base to rescale the whole UI.

radius.$description: calc(N * --radius). Tailwind v4 radius ladder (2/3/4 = sm/md/lg) but numeric for consistency with spacing.

spacing.$description: calc(N * --spacing). Change --spacing to rescale UI density.

shadow.$description: Tailwind v4 default shadow set. Neutral RGBA, no tint.

motionEase.$description: Material 3 emphasized easings. standard = enter+exit, decelerate = enter, accelerate = exit.

semantic.$description: Role tokens with app-wide UI meaning, independent of FlowTyping domain.

domain.$description: FlowTyping-specific tokens bound to the domain model (FingerId, KeyCap roles, press results, TypingStream). See docs/03-ui-viewmodel-contract.md.

finger.$description: Per-FingerId active color. Applied ONLY when fingerState='TARGET'. Index = anatomy: 1=thumb, 2=index, 3=middle, 4=ring, 5=pinky; base=palm (LB/RB). Do NOT replace with a single accent.

inactive.description: INACTIVE — neighbour finger on active hand

idle.description: IDLE / NONE — finger on inactive hand

error.description: ERROR — finger that pressed wrong key

navigationVisualization.$description: Core product visualization: path of the finger from home key to target. Cold blue path + warm amber target = mechanical keyboard + living hand. Preserve the duality.

target-marker.description: amber overlay on the active finger

cursor-border.description: amber outer border of FlowLine focus frame

symbol.$description: TypingStream symbol lifecycle. fg = RegularSymbol colour, -bg = FlowLine row bg. Lifecycle: pending → correct | corrected | error | errors.

errors.description: repeated errors on the same symbol

correct-bg.description: FlowLine row bg for correct symbol

error-bg.description: FlowLine row bg for error symbol

cursor.$description: CursorSymbol block caret in FlowLine. Only inverted-colour symbol; marks current input position.

keycap.$description: KeyCap rendering layers: base typography, per-finger colour groups, system-key overrides (secondary/accent), navigation role, press result.

label.description: key label colour; also home-key ring and PATH outline

group.$description: Five per-finger column colour groups. Mapping: neutral→L1/R1 (thumb), yellow→L2/R2 (index), sky→L3/R3 (middle), indigo→L4/R4 (ring), purple→L5/R5 (pinky). Colour = finger owner, not decoration.

secondary.$description: Override for neutral system keys (Tab, Shift, Enter, Backspace, etc.).

accent.$description: Warm orange colour-group override for highlighted accent keys. Not the same as navigationRole='TARGET'.

role-target.$description: navigationRole='TARGET' — key the player must press now. Overridden only by press result.

arrow.$description: NavArrow SVG inside KeyCap when navigationRole='PATH' — points to next key on finger path. Custom green, distinct from finger palette and path-highlight.
